title: 10 inch Bread Proofing Basket Set 100% Natural Bread Banneton Proofing Basket Oval Banneton Bowl Sourdough Bread Making Tools with Dough Whisk, Linen Liner Cloth, Dough Scraper, Bread Lame & Blades
features: 🍞【𝗣𝗥𝗔𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗖𝗔𝗟 𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗙𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗞𝗜𝗧】🍞 10inch oval bread proofing baskets , + 1 Linen liner Cloth+ 1 Dough Whisk + 1 Plastic Scraper + Bread Lame Cutter and 5 Blades; Indonesian Rattan is a high quality natural material originating from Indonesia,This vine grows in the rainforest and has a strong fibrous structure that provides good durability and stability for the bread basket, natural rattan,cane that is eco-friendly, food-safe, and non-toxic.

🍞【𝗙𝗨𝗡𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗔𝗟𝗜𝗧𝗬】🍞‎𝐂𝐓𝐃𝐌𝐉 Sourdough proofing basket with Linen liner Clothvery functional when used as bread baskets. They are usually designed as an open structure for easy access and placement of bread and other food items. At the same time, the natural antibacterial properties of Indonesian rattan also help keep food fresh and safe.Whether in a home kitchen or a commercial bakery, the sourdough proving basket is a practical choice. Size: 25*15*8.5cm/9.85*6*3.4inch.

🍞【𝗘𝗔𝗦𝗬 𝗧𝗢 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗘𝗔𝗦𝗬 𝗧𝗢 𝗖𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗡 】🍞 The oval bread banneton proofing basket set is ideal for making all types of bread that need time to rise or expand - With its durable white cloth liner that has an elastic edging that stretches for removing, bread proofing basket can be machine or hand washed - Professional use and cleaning with tips are included. Bread basket set for bread baking lovers, suitable for professional and amateur bakers.

🍞【𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗖𝗥𝗔𝗙𝗧𝗘𝗗】🍞Indonesian Rattan bread proofing basket set are carefully crafted by experienced artisans using traditional hand-weaving techniques. Each basket is unique as they allow a certain flexibility in the production process and can be fine-tuned according to the designer's creativity and aesthetic. Attractive in appearance and function, the Oval Indonesian Rattan Bread Basket lends a unique style and taste whether used for everyday baking or special occasions.

🍞【𝗔𝗣𝗣𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗘 𝗧𝗘𝗫𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘】🍞 The oval design gives the bread basket its unique shape. Compared with the traditional round bread basket, the oval shape is more fashionable and chic. Indonesian rattan bread basket has unique texture and color, presenting a natural texture and beauty. Score patterns with the bread lame and use the stencils for eye catching designs bread baking kit makes for an amazing and thoughtful gift idea.
description: 🎁🎁🎁 Product Description -Handmade from high quality nature rattan -Best for rising dough -Comply with EU food standard -Comes with liner 💕💕💕 Reminders Tips 💕💕💕 The bread proving bowl is handmade from natural Indonesian rattan. At first there will be a smell similar to bamboo, this is normal. Therefore, we recommend that rinse the basket with clean water and place it in a ventilated place to dry before you first time to use it. 🎁🎁🎁 Scope of delivery: 1 * Oval Proving Baske 1 * Cloth liner 1 * Dough Whisk 1 * Plastic Scraper 1 * Bread Lame Cutter + 5 x Replaceable blades + 1 x Leather
